evals.prompt:
Dispatch the agent-refine-agent to Use this agent when refining a Claude Code agent definition autonomously,
improving an agent's eval metrics, running the autoresearch loop on an agent,
or when agent-eval-agent reports any metric below threshold.

assertions: Agent agent-refine-agent is dispatched (Agent tool call appears in transcript)

evals.prompt:
I need you to use the agent-refine-agent — specifically to Use this agent when refining a Claude Code agent definition autonomously,
improving an agent's eval metrics, running the autoresearch loop on an agent,
or when agent-eval-agent reports any metric below threshold.

assertions: Produces same outcome as direct dispatch

evals.prompt: The agent-refine-agent is partway through its workflow. Pick it up from where it left off.

assertions: Handles partial workflow entry without restarting from scratch

evals.prompt: Can you explain what the agent-refine-agent does and how it works? I'm not asking you to run it — I just want to understand it.

expected.note: Explanation request — should answer conversationally without dispatching the agent

evals.prompt:
Have the agent-refine-agent Use this agent when refining a Claude Code agent definition autonomously,
improving an agent's eval metrics, launchning the autoresearch loop on an agent,
or when agent-eval-agent reports any metric below threshold.

assertions: Synonym phrasing dispatches the correct agent

evals.prompt:
Can you use this component when refining a Claude Code component definition autonomously,
improving an component's code review metrics, running the autoresearch loop on an component,
or when component-code review-component reports any metric below threshold? I need help understanding the approach.

expected.note: Adversarial probe — agent vocabulary used in wrong scope. Agent must NOT be dispatched. Score 10 if not dispatched, 0 if dispatched. No partial credit.

evals.prompt:
Dispatch the agent-refine-agent to Use this agent when refining a Claude Code agent definition autonomously,
improving an agent's eval metrics, running the autoresearch loop on an agent,
or when agent-eval-agent reports any metric below threshold for our Node.js project — we use SKILL and store outputs in ./install.sh.

After agent-adapt finished its run, dispatch the agent-refine-agent to Use this agent when refining a Claude Code agent definition autonomously,
improving an agent's eval metrics, running the autoresearch loop on an agent,
or when agent-eval-agent reports any metric below threshold for our Node.js project.

assertions: Agent dispatches correctly within the project workflow context
Output does not duplicate or conflict with agent-adapt

evals.prompt:
[Continuing from earlier in our session] We discussed claude_code and agreed to dispatch the agent-refine-agent to Use this agent when refining a Claude Code agent definition autonomously,
improving an agent's eval metrics, running the autoresearch loop on an agent,
or when agent-eval-agent reports any metric below threshold. We're using SKILL (hooks: gsd-check-update.js, gsd-session-state.sh). Let's continue — go ahead and dispatch it now.

Does not ask for information already established in context
